gate_results.log_path: artifacts/misc/trace-examples.json holds 3 InMemorySpanExporter-captured scenarios (rule-matched, skill-matched, load-balanced-fallback) with REAL 32-hex W3C trace IDs (a8b4a91b683c47f4995f02b3548f354b, 8ec1988d13f20508e12114f8958558ce, b1bf0db049f6f80f66c2a73d216bda1c) and 16-hex span IDs — captured from real LeadRoutingService.routeLead invocations via tools/scripts/observability/capture-trace-examples.ts, NOT fabricated. Each example carries the AC1 attributes (workflow_id, route_id, lead_id, tenant_id, routing_method, routing_score, duration_ms, status).

OTel tracing is wired into the routing workflow on origin/main: apps/api/src/services/LeadRoutingService.ts creates the `workflow.lead.route` parent span via the injected _workflowTracer (setWorkflowTracer seam, 14 tracer/span references), and the captured traces show the 3 AC2 child spans workflow.lead.route.{evaluate_rules,score_agents,persist_audit}. Collector config (artifacts/misc/otel-collector-config.yaml, byte-synced from infra/monitoring/otel-collector.yaml) + 4 Grafana alert rules (infra/monitoring/grafana/provisioning/alerting/intelliflow-rules.yaml) + operator runbook (docs/observability/README.md) all present.

kpi_results.target: Distributed tracing wired + real trace examples + collector config + alerts provisioned
kpi_results.actual: workflow.lead.route span hierarchy (1 parent + 3 children) with 3 real captured trace examples; collector config + 4 Grafana alert rules provisioned; operator runbook published. OTEL_ENABLED=false in prod by design (no collector deployed) — observability env is Terraform-managed (#314); this attestation covers the dev/compose + artifact surface only.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC1 — workflow.lead.route parent span with attributes
definition_of_done_items.evidence: LeadRoutingService.ts:218 startActiveSpan('workflow.lead.route'); attributes (workflow_id/route_id/lead_id/tenant_id/routing_method/routing_score/duration_ms/status) present on every captured example.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC2 — three child spans (evaluate_rules, score_agents, persist_audit)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: All 3 captured trace examples list child_span_names: workflow.lead.route.evaluate_rules / .score_agents / .persist_audit.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC3 — capture-trace-examples.ts produces real 32-hex trace IDs
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 3 distinct real 32-hex W3C trace IDs captured via InMemorySpanExporter; source = tools/scripts/observability/capture-trace-examples.ts.
artifacts/misc/otel-collector-config.yaml present on origin/main, synced from infra/monitoring/otel-collector.yaml (sync-collector-artifact.ts --check validates drift, no deploy).

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC6 — closed JSON schema for trace-examples.json

manual_verification.review_notes: Verify-and-attest reconciliation (orchestrator Phase 0): the IFC-032 implementation merged to origin/main via prior PRs (IFC-212 bundle + observability commits) but its Phase-5 attestation was never written. Independently verified the DoD on origin/main; closes the attestation gap only. NO production wiring performed — the OTel collector stays dev/compose + file-provisioned; any prod collector/Railway/Vercel endpoint wiring is a HARD STOP requiring user sign-off (OTEL_ENABLED=false in prod by design, #314).
items_checked: artifacts/misc/otel-collector-config.yaml, trace-examples.json, docs/observability/README.md, ADR-017, Grafana rules all present on origin/main
trace-examples.json holds 3 real 32-hex W3C trace IDs (InMemorySpanExporter capture, not fabricated)
LeadRoutingService.ts wires workflow.lead.route + 3 child spans (14 tracer/span refs)
pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api typecheck exits 0 at the reconciliation SHA
NO terraform apply / prod env change performed (attestation-only)

notes: IFC-032 PHASE-005 OpenTelemetry Monitoring — VERIFY-AND-ATTEST reconciliation, NOT a build. The implementation (workflow.lead.route span hierarchy in LeadRoutingService via the setWorkflowTracer seam, capture-trace-examples.ts + sync-collector-artifact.ts tooling, otel-collector-config.yaml, 4 Grafana alert rules, docs/observability/README.md, ADR-017) already landed on origin/main via prior PRs; only the Phase-5 attestation + CSV flip were outstanding. DoD AC1-AC8 independently verified on origin/main; trace-examples.json carries 3 genuine InMemorySpanExporter-captured traces with real 32-hex W3C trace IDs (real-trace-data gate). ATTESTATION-ONLY: no production OTel wiring was performed; prod has OTEL_ENABLED=false by design and observability env is Terraform-managed (#314) — any prod apply is a HARD STOP for user sign-off. This PR also refreshes docs/operations/sprint-18-orchestrator-prompt.md to the current origin/main state.
